steps.label: Ba
steps.narration: It looks a bit like a heart. Remember, a consonant without a mark has an inherent 'a' sound.
steps.buttyTip: When you're ready, tap Got it to draw Ba.

steps.label: Ba
steps.prompt: Type the romanization of this character.
steps.successFeedback: Correct. Ba is your first consonant.

steps.label: Ka
steps.narration: Two wavy lines connected by a downward stroke.

steps.label: Ka
steps.prompt: Type the romanization of this character.

steps.label: Da / Ra
steps.intro: Da and Ra share the same shape.
steps.narration: Traditionally, Da and Ra are written the same way. It's a single curved line.
steps.buttyTip: Context tells you if it's Da or Ra.

steps.label: Da / Ra
steps.prompt: Type either romanization for this character.
steps.successFeedback: Correct! Either Da or Ra is right.

steps.label: Ga
steps.prompt: Type the romanization of this character.
steps.successFeedback: Great! You finished the Core Four.
